notes: Fort Bend proposed commercial - Jordan Ranch Plaza, ZIP 77423 (Fulshear/Katy TX). Search found Plaza at Jordan Ranch (The Retail Connection) and Jordan Ranch retail corridor at NEC Texas Heritage Pkwy & Jordan Crossing Blvd. Known tenants at nearby Jordan Ranch retail: Chipotle (leased), National Urgent Care, Take5 Oil Change, car wash, Fifth Third Bank (in negotiations), with a 121,000 SF H-E-B planned nearby. No tenants confirmed for this specific plaza parcel.
